ddls:
CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dean responsible for the faculty */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the faculty */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the faculty */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the faculty's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_dean_id FOREIGN KEY ("dean_id") REFERENCES faculty_deans ("dean_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty the department belongs to */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES department_heads ("head_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "module_code" TEXT /* Module code of the course */,
  "module_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "module_class" TEXT /* Module class type (e.g., L - L1 - 3138) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the course is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* JSON array of prerequisite courses */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the course is elective */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_type" TEXT /* Type of enrollment (e.g., UG, GD, DK, NG, CPE) */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty the student is enrolled in */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  "current_year" INTEGER /* Current academic year of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_deans" (
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dean */,
  "dean_name" TEXT /* Full name of the dean */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the dean */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty the dean is responsible for */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the dean's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the dean */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dean_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_heads" (
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department head */,
  "head_name" TEXT /* Full name of the department head */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department head */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the head is responsible for */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the head's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("head_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty offering the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)
